scripts.build: if exist "scripts" ( rmdir /s/q "scripts" ) && md "scripts" && tsc --build && xcopy "typescript\json.js" "scripts" /Y  && xcopy "typescript\bridgeTalkPolyfill.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\ParralaxPresets.json" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\Transitions\Transitions" "scripts\Transitions\Transitions" /i && xcopy "typescript\Drawer\DrawTypes\VectorDrawerMasks" "scripts\Drawer\DrawTypes\VectorDrawerMasks" /i && npm run-script build --prefix "..\GraphCode"
